about.title: Tradition Meets Modernity
about.text1: For over three decades, Glaserei Schubert has been your reliable partner for all glass work in Leipzig and the region. What began as a small craft business in 1990 is today a recognised specialist company with comprehensive expertise in modern glass technology.
about.text2: Our team of experienced master glaziers combines craftsmanship tradition with the latest glass processing technologies. Precision, quality and personal consultation are the core values on which we have built our work.

process.title: Our Work Process
process.subtitle: From the first enquiry to final installation – transparent, on schedule and at the highest quality.

steps.title: Consultation & Survey
steps.description: Free on-site consultation and precise measurement by our experts.

steps.title: Quote & Planning
steps.description: Detailed quote with transparent pricing and scheduling.

steps.title: Manufacturing
steps.description: Professional production in our workshop with state-of-the-art machinery.

steps.title: Installation & Acceptance
steps.description: Professional installation by our experienced team with final quality control.
